channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Cars parked fully on the pavement, 6th July
item.description:
Not one but three cars all parked fully taking up the pavement. Where is the traffic warden these days to put a stop to this? It s happening daily. There is a child on my street in a wheelchair who needs the pavement cleared, as well as other children who need to use the pavement to get to school. Residents are having to walk in the road due to these unchecked car owners

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peak Hill Gardens, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on bus shelter windows, 6th July
item.description:
Please replace
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queen's Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Flytipping in Jenningtree Road o/s no. 1, 6th July
item.description:
Flytipping in Jenningtree Road o/s no. 1 - Quilt, pillows, bin and other rubbish - please can this be removed asap
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Jenningtree Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 88 to 78 ST Georges way . SE15 6QT, 6th July
item.description:
These has been long more four weeks. Many bottles and other rubbish. See from the photo. Please can this be solved. I am not sure why this road never been clean .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dragon Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over grown bushes from private property, 6th July
item.description:
This over grown bush continues to get worse and is a danger to traffic joining the Southborough Road - A serious accident is just waiting to happen. Not to mention the difficulty using the footpath which again is a hindrance to pedestrians, especially to those with impaired sight. The property concerned on Mayfield Road could be a rented accommodation!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mayfield Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 114-130 Tudor road flat, 6th July
item.description:
So Dirty- neighbour 112 is fly tipping constantly. And no from Council cleans this flat weekly or monthly this flat has not been mopped in years. It’s unacceptable we pay for cleaning.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tudor Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lambscroft Avenue, Chinbrook, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipping on road outside number 40, 6th July
item.description:
Fly tipping waste in bags has been left on the road for 3/4 days. Abandoned food waste bin has been on the street for weeks.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Daubeney Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
